untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for Inverted Cup-with-Handle requires multi-bar shape analysis (rounded top formation with handle geometry). This requires pattern detection algorithms not available in the allowed indicator set (which only supports point-in-time price/technical values). Specifically: (1) Identifying the cup's rounded top shape requires analyzing high points over multiple bars; (2) Measuring handle height and applying it to the right rim requires tracking specific pivot points and relative measurements; (3) No allowed indicators can detect or quantify cup/handle geometry. The entry condition 'Pattern appears as rounded top with handle formation' cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a visual chart pattern that requires pattern recognition beyond the scope of the allowed indicators. Entry and exit conditions are placeholder logic based on pivot reversal (close crossing pivot), which is NOT a valid substitute for the actual cup-with-handle pattern detection. To implement this signal properly, a custom pattern recognition function would be required. The target measurement rules (handle height applied to right rim low, or alternative half-cup height) also cannot be operationalized without pattern detection.
